title: limniris graminea
intro: Limniris graminea, also known as the grass-leaved iris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Limniris graminea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
